name: Mentimeter Interactive Presentation and Polling API
what_it_does: Mentimeter interactive presentation and audience engagement REST API for corporate trainers, educators, and event organizers to create interactive presentations with live polls, quizzes, word clouds, Q&A sessions, and rating scales — enabling real-time audience participation and engagement data collection through Mentimeter's web-based platform used by 400M+ users across 200+ countries. Enables AI agents to manage presentation creation for interactive content automation, handle slide addition for poll and quiz configuration automation, access voting data for real-time audience response automation, retrieve presentation results for engagement analytics automation, manage Q&A session for audience question collection automation, handle word cloud for qualitative feedback automation, access quiz results for gamified assessment automation, retrieve export data for post-event reporting automation, manage audience join for participation tracking automation, and integrate Mentimeter with LMS, HR, and event platforms for end-to-end audience engagement automation.
use_cases: Creating interactive presentations with live polls for corporate training engagement automation agents
Collecting real-time audience responses and word clouds for event facilitation automation agents
Accessing Mentimeter quiz results and engagement metrics for learning analytics automation agents
Integrating Mentimeter with event management platforms for participant engagement automation agents
not_for: Secure academic assessments requiring proctoring (Mentimeter is open engagement, not secure testing)
Complex adaptive learning engines (Mentimeter is slide-based engagement, not LMS)
Offline presentations without internet (Mentimeter requires live internet connection for real-time polling)
best_when: A corporate trainer, event organizer, or educator wanting AI agents to create and manage interactive Mentimeter presentations with live polls, word clouds, and Q&A for audience engagement automation.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE PLAN REQUIRED FOR API: Mentimeter API access requires Enterprise subscription; automated free or Pro plan API assumption creates no API access; automated must have Mentimeter Enterprise plan. PRESENTATION IS SLIDE-BASED: Mentimeter content is organized as presentations with slides, each slide having a specific interaction type; automated generic form assumption creates wrong content model; automated must design content as presentation→slides→interaction type hierarchy. REAL-TIME VOTING REQUIRES LIVE SESSION: Mentimeter voting is synchronous during active presentation; automated async voting assumption creates session not active error; automated must distinguish between live voting and imported results. API IS RESULTS-FOCUSED: Mentimeter's API provides presentation management and results access; automated full presentation control assumption creates missing live session control; automated should review API capabilities before committing to deep integrations.

auth.notes: Mentimeter uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Stockholm, Sweden HQ. Founded 2014 by Johnny Warström, Niklas Ingvarsson, and Henrik Ekenberg. Products: Live polls, word clouds, quiz, Q&A, rating scale, open-ended questions, scales. SDKs: None public. 400M+ users, 200+ countries. Enterprise subscription for API. GDPR, FERPA compliant. Competes with Kahoot and Slido for audience engagement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API requires Enterprise plan; free and Pro plans are UI-only
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic free, Pro $11.99/month, Enterprise custom pricing; API requires Enterprise
pricing.notes: Stockholm SE. Enterprise subscription for API. GDPR, FERPA. 400M users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; results and presentation APIs throttled per Enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE PLAN REQUIRED: Mentimeter API requires Enterprise subscription; automated free/Pro plan API access assumption creates unauthorized error; automated must have active Enterprise subscription before API integration

PRESENTATION HIERARCHY IS SLIDE-BASED: Mentimeter content model is Presentation→Slides→Interaction Type; automated flat content assumption creates wrong data structure; automated must model content as presentations with typed slides

VOTING IS LIVE SESSION ONLY: Mentimeter voting occurs during active live presentation session; automated async or background voting assumption creates session_not_active error; automated should access results after live session completes

NO WEBHOOKS: Mentimeter API does not support webhooks; automated event-driven result notification assumption creates missing notification capability; automated must poll for results after session ends

FERPA FOR EDUCATIONAL DATA: Mentimeter student engagement data in US institutions may be FERPA-protected; automated unrestricted data sharing creates privacy compliance risk; automated educational deployments must implement FERPA-compliant data handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: EdTech/corporate engagement. GDPR, FERPA, CCPA. OAuth2. EU/SE. Audience response and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Audience engagement platform. GDPR, FERPA. OAuth2. EU/SE. Audience response data.
